footer.legalNotice: Legal content is scaffolded and should be replaced with approved production text before public launch.

earlyAccess.message: {appName} is under active development. Features may change, and some things might not work perfectly yet.

cookieBanner.message: We use essential cookies to keep {appName} stable and optional cookies to improve your experience. See our

translationNotice.message: This page was recently translated with AI support and may still contain translation errors.

networkStatus.offlineDescription: Login and cloud sync are unavailable right now. We'll keep checking and reconnect automatically.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Reach out with product questions, bugs, partnerships, or translation feedback.
contact.responseNote: We usually reply within 2-3 business days.

form.title: Send us a message
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us how we can help.
form.privacyNote: We use these details only to process and reply to your request.
form.successBody: Thanks, your message was sent successfully.
form.errorBody: We could not submit your message through the form. Please email us directly instead.
form.fallbackBody: If the form limit is reached or submission fails, contact us at:
form.validationEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
form.validationMessageLength: Your message is too long. Maximum is {max} characters.

bugReport.actionNotWorking: A button or action does not work

tripArchive.title: Archive trip?
tripArchive.messageQuestion: Are you sure you want to archive "{title}"?
tripArchive.messageDetail: This trip will be removed from your list and can be restored later.

roundTripSync.title: Update roundtrip endpoint?
roundTripSync.messageLead: This trip looks like a roundtrip.
roundTripSync.messageQuestion: Also change the final city to "{title}"?

cityPaletteApply.title: Apply palette to current cities?
cityPaletteApply.messageAuto: Choose Apply automatically to recolor all cities now.
cityPaletteApply.messageManual: Choose Manual selection to keep existing city colors and only switch the active palette.

markdownLink.title: Insert link
markdownLink.messageLine1: Enter a URL for the selected text or insert a new link.
markdownLink.messageLine2: The link opens in a new tab with secure defaults.
markdownLink.label: URL
markdownLink.validationProtocol: URL must start with http:// or https://

offline.title: You are offline. Changes will be queued.
offline.messageNone: Planner stays usable with cached data.
offline.messageOne: {count} change is queued and will sync after reconnect.
offline.messageMany: {count} changes are queued and will sync after reconnect.
offline.browserTitle: You are offline. Changes stay local.
offline.browserMessage: Reconnect to continue cloud sync. We will retry automatically.
offline.serviceMessage: Your internet works, but the sync service is not responding. Edits stay queued and safe.

degraded.title: Connection is unstable. Saving in resilient mode.
degraded.messageNone: Planner stays usable while we retry in the background.
degraded.messageOne: {count} queued change will sync when Supabase stabilizes.
degraded.messageMany: {count} queued changes will sync when Supabase stabilizes.
degraded.serviceMessage: Cloud sync is unstable right now. We keep retrying in the background.

banner.forcedMode: Supabase outage simulation is currently forced in debugger mode.
banner.retryHint: Retrying Supabase connection every 30s while this tab stays open.

offline.messageNone: Offline mode enabled. Trip data is served from local cache.
offline.messageOne: Offline mode enabled. {count} change is queued for sync.
offline.messageMany: Offline mode enabled. {count} changes are queued for sync.
offline.browser: Offline mode enabled. Your latest edits are saved locally until reconnect.
offline.service: Cloud sync is currently unavailable. Your latest edits are queued safely.

degraded.messageNone: Connection is degraded. Edits are protected with local queue fallback.
degraded.messageOne: Connection is degraded. {count} change is queued for replay.
degraded.messageMany: Connection is degraded. {count} changes are queued for replay.
degraded.service: Connection is degraded. We are retrying queued edits in the background.

tripStrip.serverBackup: A newer server version was backed up before replay. You can restore it if needed.
tripStrip.pendingOne: {count} queued change is waiting for replay.
tripStrip.pendingMany: {count} queued changes are waiting for replay.

toast.title: Sync status
toast.serverBackupRestored: Server backup restored for this trip.
toast.syncPartialFailureOne: {count} queued change still failed. You can retry.
toast.syncPartialFailureMany: {count} queued changes still failed. You can retry.

details.offlineBrowser: You are offline. Edits are stored locally and replayed once you reconnect.
details.offlineService: Your internet is up, but cloud sync appears unavailable. We will keep retrying queued edits.
details.syncingQueue: Syncing queued edits now. Pending items: {count}.
details.online: Connection is healthy and sync is up to date.

strip.directSinceDate: Trip preview paused since {date}. Reactivate now to unlock full planning mode.
strip.directNoDate: Trip preview paused. Reactivate now to unlock full planning mode.
strip.loginSinceDate: Trip preview paused since {date}. Sign in to reactivate and unlock full planning mode.
strip.loginNoDate: Trip preview paused. Sign in to reactivate and unlock full planning mode.

title.direct: Reactivate this trip to keep planning
title.login: Sign in to reactivate this trip

description.direct: You are signed in. Reactivate now to restore editing, destination names, and map routing.
description.login: Sign in to restore editing, destination names, and map routing.

footer.withDate: Expired on {date}. Preview mode stays visible until you reactivate.
footer.noDate: Preview mode stays visible until you reactivate.

toast.title: Trip reactivated
toast.description: Full planning mode is unlocked again.

strip.failedDefault: Trip generation failed. Check diagnostics or retry with the default model.

retry.readOnly: This trip is read-only, so generation retry is unavailable.
retry.missingSnapshot: Retry requires saved generation input, but this trip has no snapshot.
retry.queued: Trip generation retry started and is running in the background.
retry.completed: Trip generation completed with the default model.
retry.failed: Trip generation failed again. Review the diagnostics and retry later.

pendingAuth.descriptionLoading: Saving your selections and checking the best way to build your itinerary.
pendingAuth.titleLocked: Creating trips is only for registered users
pendingAuth.descriptionLocked: Sign in or create an account to claim this draft and start full trip generation.

benefits.keep: Keep this trip and come back to it later.
benefits.background: Let generation finish in the background.
benefits.sync: Edit, retry, and sync it across devices.

warningSummary.title: Traveler fit notes
warningSummary.description: Some stops include practical cautions based on your traveler setup.

header.titleTooltipEditable: Open trip details and edit the title
header.shareDisabled: Activate this trip to share it

plan.title: Trip
plan.description: Keep the high-level trip context beside the planner.
plan.focusHint: Selected stop details stay in the right-side details panel.
plan.empty: Pick a city, transfer, or activity to edit it in the right-side details panel.

places.title: Places
places.description: See the trip context behind each stop.
places.empty: Pick a city or activity to open destination context.

explore.title: Explore
explore.description: Open quick discovery links for the active city.
explore.empty: Pick a city to explore stays, activities, and events.
explore.focusDescription: Use quick links to keep researching without losing your trip layout.
explore.savedStaysEmpty: No stays are saved for this city yet.

more.title: More
more.description: Open exports, history, and deeper trip controls.
more.historyDescription: Open the full trip panels when you need older versions, diagnostics, or deeper management tools.

workspace.demoHint: Demo content is mocked until live destination services are wired in.

overview.label: Overview
overview.title: Trip overview
overview.description: See your route, next steps, and travel pulse at a glance.

planner.label: Planner
planner.title: Planner workspace
planner.description: Edit the calendar, map, timeline, and selected-stop details in one focused workspace.
planner.hint: This page is fully live. The destination and language pages around it still use Thailand demo content while we wire real data.

bookings.label: Bookings
bookings.title: Bookings
bookings.description: Track reservations, due decisions, and missing logistics in one place.

travel-kit.label: Travel kit
travel-kit.title: Travel kit
travel-kit.description: Keep adapters, emergency info, arrival prep, and checklists close to the route.

documents.label: Documents
documents.title: Documents
documents.description: Keep passports, insurance, booking proofs, and offline-ready references close to the route.

places.label: Places
places.title: Places
places.description: Open country and city context with neighborhoods, safety notes, and arrival basics.

explore.label: Explore
explore.title: Explore
explore.description: Research activities, stays, and events without losing the trip layout.

phrases.label: Phrases
phrases.title: Phrases
phrases.description: Keep useful translations, pronunciation, and flashcards close to the trip.

notes.label: Notes
notes.title: Notes
notes.description: Capture planning notes, diary stubs, and quick reminders for the route.

photos.label: Photos
photos.title: Photos
photos.description: Preview the future album space for memories, highlights, and recap visuals.

infoDialog.title: Trip details
infoDialog.description: Edit core info, review history, export the trip, and check destination context.

general.editHint: Click into the title to rename the trip or adjust the essentials here.
general.readOnlyHintExample: Example trips stay read-only here. Copy the trip first if you want to rename it or save it as a favorite.
general.readOnlyHintShared: This shared trip is read-only. You can review the details here, but editing is disabled.
general.sourceSharedDescription: This itinerary was copied from a shared trip snapshot.
general.sourceTripDescription: This itinerary was copied from another trip in your workspace.

history.example: Example trips do not save history snapshots. Copy this trip first if you want to keep edits and revisit them later.
history.pendingSyncOne: 1 latest change is saved locally and not synced yet.
history.pendingSyncMany: {count} latest changes are saved locally and not synced yet.
history.failedSyncOne: 1 queued change still failed to sync. Retry sync to publish it.
history.failedSyncMany: {count} queued changes still failed to sync. Retry sync to publish them.

activities.title: Activities calendar
activities.description: Export planned activities as an .ics file so you can drop them into your calendar app.

cities.title: Cities calendar
cities.description: Create a cleaner trip skeleton with city arrivals and stays only.

everything.title: Complete calendar bundle
everything.description: Download one calendar file with cities, transfers, and activities together.

print.title: Print layout
print.description: Open a print-friendly version of this trip for PDFs, handouts, or trip briefings.

destination.locked: Destination details unlock once this trip is activated.
destination.empty: No destination information is available for this trip yet.
destination.futureChecksDescription: This tab is ready for more trip-specific guidance as we add richer destination data.

claimConflict.title: This trip draft was already claimed
claimConflict.descriptionLoggedOut: Sign in with the original account or start a similar trip with the same setup.
claimConflict.descriptionLoggedIn: This draft is already attached to another account. Start a similar trip with the same setup.
claimConflict.loginCta: Sign in with the original account

benefits.prefill: Reuse your traveler setup, dates, and transport choices.
benefits.adjust: Adjust the draft before starting a fresh generation.
